title: Add NomNom and Polly community models
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: The mascots have awakened
gist.blurb: Our resident bee and data-eating mochi are now playable characters. Well, chat-able models. Polly codes, NomNom researches.
gist.summary: Registered 'NomNom' (web research) and 'Polly' (code assistant) as new community text models with reasoning capabilities.
gist.impact: Developers can now access these specialized agents via the text API using pass-through authentication.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the Bee and Nomnom the creature stepping out of a 2D drawing into a 3D-ish pixelated server room. They are now 'active' agents. Polly wears a tiny headset, Nomnom holds a magnifying glass.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot wearing a tiny headset and the round tan nomnom creature holding a magnifying glass, standing on a glowing lime green (#ecf874) platform. Background is a soft pastel server room. Text in pixel font: 'ONLINE'. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting.
